title: silene conica subsp. conoidea
intro: Silene conica subsp. conoidea, also known as conical catchfly, is a plant species within the Caryophyllaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, due to its bioactive compounds. Conical catchfly can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties and reap its potential health benefits.
